homeHowItWorks.heading: How Dorixé works
homeHowItWorks.subheading: Dorixé connects you with trusted, independent cleaning professionals — booked online and tailored to your home. One-time or recurring, we make it simple to keep your home clean, fresh, and stress-free.
homeHowItWorks.step1Desc: Choose your location, the cleaning service, and any preferences.
homeHowItWorks.step2Desc: Compare cleaners' hourly rates before you book — no hidden fees.
homeHowItWorks.step3Desc: Pick a date and time and pay safely through our platform.
homeHowItWorks.step4Desc: A vetted, independent cleaning professional takes care of the rest.

homeEcoBand.heading: Our environmental impact
homeEcoBand.subheading: Every DORIXÉ booking makes the planet a little greener
homeEcoBand.footer: DORIXÉ offsets 100% of service-related transport emissions · Verified by EcoAudit EU

homeJobPost.description: Describe your cleaning task, set your budget, and let verified eco-cleaners compete to win your booking — like Upwork, but for spotless homes.
homeJobPost.liveBidsLabel: Live bids on a deep-clean job · Amsterdam
homeJobPost.bid1Message: Available this Saturday with certified organic products. I bring all supplies!
homeJobPost.bid2Message: Friday morning available. 3 years deep-clean experience, zero-waste approach.
homeJobPost.bid3Message: Specialised in end-of-tenancy. Bringing all eco supplies, GDPR-compliant photos.

homeTestimonials.heading: Loved by thousands across Europe
homeTestimonials.subheading: Real reviews from verified DORIXÉ customers
homeTestimonials.review1Text: My flat has never been this clean. The cleaner used plant-based products that smelled amazing and didn't irritate my allergies. Booking was instant — I had confirmation in under 2 minutes.
homeTestimonials.review2Text: Used DORIXÉ for our office monthly clean. The eco-certified team is professional, punctual, and the booking dashboard is a dream. Our whole company switched.
homeTestimonials.review3Text: Post-move deep clean was flawless. I used the bidding system and had 4 competitive offers within an hour. The eco-score transparency is a genuinely nice touch.

homeCta.heading: Ready for a fresh, green home?
homeCta.description: Book your first eco-friendly clean today, or post a job and let verified professionals bid for your business.

sustainability.heroSubtitle: Every booking on DORIXÉ connects you with vetted eco-conscious cleaners who use sustainable, non-toxic products that protect your family and the planet.
sustainability.levelBasicDesc: Uses some eco-friendly products. Getting started on their green journey.
sustainability.levelCertifiedDesc: Certified eco products. No harsh chemicals. Verified by DORIXÉ.
sustainability.levelPremiumDesc: 100% eco product commitment. Full carbon footprint reporting.
sustainability.levelZeroImpactDesc: Carbon-neutral operations. Offsets every job. Top 5% of providers.
sustainability.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of households making the sustainable choice.

howItWorksPage.metaDescription: Book trusted eco-friendly cleaners in 3 simple steps.
howItWorksPage.heroSubtitle: Book trusted, eco-certified cleaners in minutes. Or join as a provider and grow your eco-cleaning business.
howItWorksPage.customerStep1Desc: Enter your postcode or city. Browse vetted eco-certified cleaners sorted by rating and distance. Filter by service type, eco level, and availability.
howItWorksPage.customerStep2Desc: Select a time slot, add special instructions, and pay securely via card. Your payment is held in escrow — only released after the job is done.
howItWorksPage.customerStep3Desc: Your cleaner arrives at the scheduled time using non-toxic, eco-certified products. After completion, leave a review and help grow the green cleaning community.
howItWorksPage.providerStep1Desc: Create a provider account, submit your eco certifications, and complete identity verification. Approval takes 1–2 business days.
howItWorksPage.providerStep2Desc: Add your services, pricing, working hours, and service radius. Connect your Stripe account for weekly payouts.
howItWorksPage.providerStep3Desc: Browse job posts, submit bids, or receive direct bookings. Get paid weekly via bank transfer. DORIXÉ charges customers a 15% platform fee — you keep 100% of your quoted price.

becomeCleaner.heroSubtitle: Join DORIXÉ's network of vetted eco-friendly cleaners. Set your own rates, choose your jobs, and get paid weekly.
becomeCleaner.perkRateBody: DORIXÉ charges customers a 15% platform fee on top — your quoted price is yours, always.
becomeCleaner.perkScheduleBody: Set your own availability, service area, and take only the bookings you want.
becomeCleaner.perkPayoutBody: Earnings are transferred to your bank every Monday via Stripe.
becomeCleaner.perkReputationBody: Every completed booking adds a verified review to your public profile.
becomeCleaner.perkEcoBody: All DORIXÉ cleaners use certified non-toxic products. We verify it.
becomeCleaner.perkDualBody: Already a customer? Switch roles in one click — your Provider Account stays separate.
becomeCleaner.noRoleBody: Create your DORIXÉ account to join as a cleaner.
becomeCleaner.dualBody: Switch between Cleaner and Provider Account from the top navigation.
becomeCleaner.providerBody: Want to also post jobs and hire other cleaners? Enable your Provider Account with one click.
becomeCleaner.addAccountBody: Your existing account stays intact. Switch roles any time from the navbar.

about.heroSubtitle: DORIXÉ connects eco-conscious households with vetted, certified cleaners who care as much about the planet as they do about a spotless home.
about.timelineProblemTitle: Finding a trustworthy eco-cleaner was nearly impossible
about.timelineProblemBody: Most cleaning platforms are packed with unlisted providers using chemical-heavy products. Customers who care about sustainability had no way to verify who was actually eco-friendly and who was just claiming to be.
about.timelineIdeaTitle: A marketplace that starts from eco, not retrofits it
about.timelineIdeaBody: We decided to build a platform where eco certification is the entry requirement, not an optional badge. Every provider must prove their credentials before they can take a single booking.
about.timelineSolutionBody: A full marketplace with identity-verified providers, escrow payments, a transparent bidding system, and automated weekly payouts. Built for households who want both quality and sustainability.
about.missionHeading: Make eco-friendly cleaning the default, not the exception
about.missionBody: Millions of homes are cleaned every week using products that are harsh on surfaces, harmful to health, and damaging to waterways. We're changing that — one verified booking at a time. DORIXÉ makes it as easy to book a certified eco-cleaner as it is to order a taxi.
about.valueEcoFirstBody: Every provider on DORIXÉ is vetted for their use of non-toxic, biodegradable, and certified eco-friendly products. No greenwashing — we verify the certifications.
about.valueTrustedBody: All cleaners pass identity verification (Stripe Identity), background checks, and a manual approval review before their first booking. Your home, protected.
about.valuePricingBody: Providers set their own prices. You pay their quoted price plus a 15% platform fee — visible before you confirm. No hidden charges, no surprises at checkout.
about.valueQualityBody: Every completed booking unlocks a verified review. Ratings are real — only customers who booked and paid can leave feedback. Consistent quality or providers are removed.
about.valueFairBody: Cleaners keep 100% of their quoted price. The platform fee is charged to the customer, not deducted from the provider. We believe the people doing the work deserve to be paid fairly.
about.valueEuropeBody: DORIXÉ is designed for the EU market — GDPR-compliant from day one, payments in EUR, European address formats, and provider onboarding that meets local regulations.
about.howSubtitle: Two ways to use the platform — for households and for cleaners.
about.customerPoint1: Search vetted eco-certified cleaners near you
about.customerPoint2: Book directly or post a job and receive competitive bids
about.customerPoint3: Pay securely — funds held in escrow until the job is done
about.customerPoint4: Leave a verified review after every booking
about.providerPoint1: Apply once — approval takes 1–2 business days
about.providerPoint2: Set your own prices and working hours
about.providerPoint3: Browse job posts and submit bids to grow your client base
about.providerPoint4: Keep 100% of your quoted price — weekly bank payouts
about.ctaHeading: Ready for a cleaner, greener home?
about.ctaBody: Join thousands of households across Europe who've switched to eco-certified cleaning.

pricing.metaDescription: Transparent pricing for customers and cleaners. Customers pay a 15% platform fee on top. Cleaners keep 100% of their rate.
pricing.customerFeature2: Pre-authorised payment — only captured on completion
pricing.providerFeature3: Job alerts in your service area
pricing.heroSubtitle: Customers pay a small platform fee. Cleaners keep every cent of their quoted rate. That's it.
pricing.customerPriceNote: Added on top of the provider's price at checkout
pricing.providerCardSubtitle: List your services and get booked
pricing.providerPriceNote: You keep 100% of your quoted rate, always
pricing.faqChargedA: Your card is pre-authorised at booking. The charge is only captured when the cleaner marks the job complete — you never pay for a booking that didn't happen.
pricing.faqCancelA: Cancel more than 48 hours before → full refund. 24–48 hours → 50% refund. Under 24 hours → no refund. If the cleaner cancels, you always get a full refund.
pricing.faqPayoutA: Every Monday, Stripe automatically transfers the week's completed booking earnings to each cleaner's connected bank account.
pricing.faqMinimumQ: Is there a minimum booking value?
pricing.faqMinimumA: No. Cleaners set their own prices and the platform fee scales with the booking — there is no floor.
pricing.ctaSubtitle: Book your first eco-friendly cleaning or join as a cleaner — no commitment required.
pricing.faqContractQ: Is there a long-term contract or minimum term?
pricing.faqContractA: No. There's no long-term contract and no minimum term — book a one-off clean or a recurring schedule, and cancel or change anytime.
pricing.faqTasksQ: What's included in a standard clean?
pricing.faqTasksA: A standard clean typically covers dusting, vacuuming, mopping, and cleaning kitchens and bathrooms. You can add specific requests when you book.

affiliate.metaDescription: Partner with DORIXÉ and earn 5% lifetime commission on every booking made by customers you refer. The eco-friendly way to grow your income.
affiliate.howStep1Body: Create a DORIXÉ account (or log in to your existing one). Your unique affiliate link is generated instantly — no approval, no waiting.
affiliate.howStep2Body: Post it on Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, your blog, or newsletter. Wherever your audience hangs out, your link works.
affiliate.howStep3Body: When someone clicks your link and books a cleaning, you earn 5% of the booking value — credited to your DORIXÉ account automatically.
affiliate.howStep4Title: Cash out or book with it
affiliate.howStep4Body: Use your credit balance to pay for your own cleanings or withdraw it. Your credit, your choice.
affiliate.benefit1Body: Every booking your referral makes — not just the first one — earns you 5%.
affiliate.benefit2Body: Track clicks, referrals, and earnings in your personal dashboard, updated live.
affiliate.benefit3Body: If someone clicks your link and books within 30 days, you get the credit.
affiliate.benefit4Body: Refer 5 people or 5,000. There's no monthly ceiling on what you can earn.
affiliate.benefit5Body: Commission lands in your credit wallet the moment a booking completes. No monthly payout delays.
affiliate.benefit6Body: Promote something you're proud of — a platform that's genuinely good for the planet.
affiliate.testimonial1Quote: I mentioned DORIXÉ once in my home-organisation video and earned €140 in the first week. The dashboard is so clean to track.
affiliate.testimonial2Quote: My eco-lifestyle newsletter recommended DORIXÉ last month. My readers loved it and I've already covered two months of my own cleanings.
affiliate.testimonial3Quote: Perfect for sustainability creators. The 5% lifetime model is genuinely rare — most programmes pay only on the first order.
affiliate.idealFor8: Anyone with an engaged, home-focused audience
affiliate.heroSubtitle: Partner with DORIXÉ and earn 5% lifetime commission on every booking made by customers you refer. No cap. No expiry. Just recurring credit for work you did once.
affiliate.howSubtitle: From sign-up to first commission in under 5 minutes.
affiliate.benefitsTitle: A programme built to reward loyal partners
affiliate.benefitsSubtitle: We designed our affiliate programme the way we'd want one ourselves — lifetime commissions, instant crediting, and a dashboard that actually shows you what's happening. No black boxes.
affiliate.idealForSubtitle: If your audience cares about their home, sustainability, or quality of life — DORIXÉ is the ideal fit.
affiliate.commissionBody: You earn 5% of each booking's subtotal (the provider's price, before the platform fee). There's no cap per booking, no cap per month, and no expiry. If someone you referred books twice a week for years, you earn on every single one of those bookings.
affiliate.ctaTitleSignedOut: Start earning today. No approval needed.
affiliate.ctaSubtitleSignedIn: Share your unique link and earn 5% on every booking your referrals make — forever.
affiliate.ctaSubtitleSignedOut: Sign up, grab your link, and share. Your first commission could arrive before the week is out.
affiliate.ctaTerms: By joining, you agree to our <terms>Terms of Service</terms>. Commission paid as platform credit.

compOnboardingProviderIdentityStep.title: Identity verification
compOnboardingProviderIdentityStep.description: DORIXÉ requires all providers to verify their identity via Stripe. This ensures customer safety and enables payouts to your bank account.
compOnboardingProviderIdentityStep.needId: • A government-issued ID (passport, national ID, or driver's licence)
compOnboardingProviderIdentityStep.needSelfie: • A selfie / photo taken during verification
compOnboardingProviderIdentityStep.needProcess: • The process takes 2–3 minutes and is handled securely by Stripe
compOnboardingProviderIdentityStep.skipButton: Skip for now — I'll do this later
compOnboardingProviderIdentityStep.footerNote: You can continue without verifying, but you won't be approved until identity verification is complete.

compProviderPricing.title: Your pricing
compProviderPricing.description: Set your hourly rate (or per-job price) for each service you offer — customers book and pay based on these rates.
compProviderPricing.empty: You haven't set any prices yet. Customers can't book you until you add at least one service with a rate.

homeWhatsIncluded.heading: What's included
homeWhatsIncluded.subheading: Everything for a fresh, healthy home — with eco-friendly options and flexible scheduling.
homeWhatsIncluded.item1: General cleaning of living areas, kitchen, and bathroom
homeWhatsIncluded.item3: Extra services like deep cleaning, window cleaning, and move-in / move-out
homeWhatsIncluded.item4: Eco preferences — plant-based products, plastic-free, and fragrance-free options
homeWhatsIncluded.item5: One-time or recurring bookings — weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly

homeWhyChoose.heading: Why choose Dorixé
homeWhyChoose.subheading: Quality cleaning you can trust, with the flexibility and transparency you deserve.
homeWhyChoose.reason2Desc: See each cleaner's hourly rate before you book — no hidden fees.
homeWhyChoose.reason3Desc: One-time or recurring — weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly.
homeWhyChoose.reason4Desc: Pay safely online through our platform — no cash required.
homeWhyChoose.reason5Desc: Sustainable products and practices — better for your home and the planet.
homeWhyChoose.trustNote: Pricing reflects the service, how long it takes, and each cleaner's hourly rate — all shown upfront. Payments are handled securely online, and after every clean you can leave a review to help keep quality high.
